steps.title: Use the perimeter ratio to find the scale factor
steps.content: For similar triangles, corresponding sides are proportional to their perimeters. Find the scale factor: $$k = \frac{\text{Perimeter of } XYZ}{\text{Perimeter of } TUV} = \frac{150}{50} = 3$$

steps.title: Apply the scale factor to the corresponding side
steps.content: Since $\overline{TU}$ corresponds to $\overline{XY}$ and the scale factor is 3: $$XY = TU \times 3 = 6 \times 3 = 18$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
